scripts.postbuild: if [ -n "$SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN" ]; then sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --url ${SENTRY_URL:-https://sentry.io} --org ${SENTRY_ORG:-gigsmart} --project haiku-mcp --release haiku-mcp@$(node -e "process.stdout.write(require('../../plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json').version)") ../../plugin/bin/haiku.map && sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --url ${SENTRY_URL:-https://sentry.io} --org ${SENTRY_ORG:-gigsmart} --project haiku-spa --release haiku-spa@$(node -e "process.stdout.write(require('../../plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json').version)") review-app/dist/assets/; fi; rm -f ../../plugin/bin/haiku.map
